meta.title: IntuiFy Ventures – Industrial Holding & Multidisciplinary Group
meta.description: IntuiFy Ventures S.L. operates as a parent holding company coordinating specialized subsidiaries in custom software, data processing, marketing, 3D manufacturing, real estate, and global travel.

hero.title: Orchestrating a portfolio of industry-leading companies
hero.subtitle: IntuiFy Ventures S.L. is the parent holding company that owns and coordinates specialized subsidiaries in software engineering, data processing, strategic marketing, industrial manufacturing, and global hospitality. A solid ecosystem engineered to unlock high-performance synergies.

services.title: Our Group Companies
services.subtitle: A portfolio of specialized subsidiaries, each focused on excellence, innovation, and regulatory compliance in its respective sector

items.title: Software & IT Solutions
features: Creation of web portals & SaaS platforms
Design of custom operating systems & apps

items.title: Data Intelligence & AI
features: Data calculation & programming for third parties
Creation of AI platforms and applications

items.title: 3D Additive Manufacturing
features: Fabrication of custom parts & spare components

items.title: Real Estate & Development
features: Civil and industrial real estate promotion
Acquisition and sale of plots and land
Leasing & management of real estate assets

items.title: Travel & Global Tourism
features: Organization of tour packages & custom travel
Online booking systems & global travel platforms

benefits.title: The Strength of Our Group
benefits.subtitle: The strategic benefits of partnering with a solid holding group to coordinate your enterprise's technology, growth, and manufacturing

items.title: Subsidiary Synergy
items.description: We seamlessly connect our technology, marketing, additive manufacturing, and hospitality companies to create unique value.

items.title: Specialized Verticals
items.description: Each portfolio company operates independently, guaranteeing dedicated expert teams and vertical specialization.

items.title: Global Footprint
items.description: Through our holding structure and operating subsidiaries, we are present globally in key tech, real estate, and tourism sectors.

items.title: Governance & Stability
items.description: Our parent company IntuiFy Ventures S.L. guarantees maximum financial, administrative, and legal solidity.

items.title: Intellectual Property
items.description: We design, build, and patent the underlying software and platforms used across our portfolio companies.

items.title: Holding-Level Consulting
items.description: We accompany every engagement with strategic advisory and corporate governance at the parent company level.

testimonials.title: Shared Success
testimonials.subtitle: How institutional partners and clients across our diverse subsidiaries achieve strategic excellence

items.quote: The IntuiFy group coordinated the development of our enterprise SaaS and managed the global marketing campaign through its subsidiaries. Outstanding results.
items.name: Marco Bianchi

items.quote: Their additive manufacturing subsidiary produced high-precision 3D spare parts for our logistics fleet, saving us weeks of operational downtime.
items.name: Elena Rossi

items.quote: We entrusted IntuiFy's real estate arm with land acquisition and the development of our new headquarters. Exceptional contractual security and financial backing.
items.name: Stefano Moretti

items.quote: The tour package and accommodation management for our overseas corporate summit were planned and executed without a single issue by their travel subsidiary.
items.name: Laura Verdi

demo.title: Ready to Partner with Our Group?
demo.subtitle: Get in touch with our experts to discover how the holding structure of IntuiFy Ventures can accelerate and secure your business.

contact.title: Connect with Our Group
contact.subtitle: Select your portfolio company or area of interest to be routed to the appropriate department, or contact the holding directly for strategic partnerships.
reasons: A single, robust parent group for tech, marketing, and logistics
Highest contractual security and backing guaranteed by the holding
Specialized vertical companies with state-of-the-art technologies
Integrated strategic consulting and corporate governance included

form.name: Full name
form.message_placeholder: Describe your needs, specifying the target subsidiary or area of interest (e.g. Software, Data, Marketing, 3D Printing, Real Estate, or Travel)...
form.success: Inquiry received! Our specialists will contact you shortly.

footer.tagline: IntuiFy Ventures S.L. is the parent holding company coordinating a portfolio of specialized subsidiaries operating in software, data processing, advertising, 3D printing, real estate, and global travel.
